name: Cheesy Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until it is crisp. Once cooked, drain the bacon and set aside 1/4 cup of the drippings.
2. Crumble the bacon, reserving 2 tablespoons for later use. Cook the green beans according to the package instructions, then drain them well.
3. In a skillet, add the mushrooms and onion along with the reserved 1/4 cup of drippings. Cook over medium-high heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add the crumbled bacon, cooked green beans, and pepper to the skillet. Mix gently.
5. Transfer the mixture into two quart serving dishes.
6. Microwave the Cheez Whiz according to the label instructions.
7. Pour the melted cheese spread over the green bean mixture.
8. Sprinkle the remaining 2 tablespoons of crumbled bacon on top before serving.
